untranslatable_reason: Signal requires option expiration detection and multi-leg spread management (diagonal to bull spread conversion). This is a structural trade management rule involving specific options expirations and strike rollovers that cannot be expressed using only price/technical indicators. Requires option chain state tracking and position management logic outside standard backtesting conditions.
translation_notes: The core logic captures the price condition (stock below 35 at April expiration), but the signal's true mechanics—detecting front-month call expiration, closing the diagonal spread, and establishing a new bull call spread by selling July 35 against July 30—require options-specific logic (expiration calendar, multi-leg position handling) not available in the allowed indicator set. A full implementation would need dedicated options backtesting framework with spread management capabilities.
